title: Native-style dialogue: medical follow-up
subtitle: Explain progress after treatment.
overview: Medical follow-up uses better, worse, still, since.

items.es: Me siento mejor desde que empecé el tratamiento.
items.en: I feel better since I started the treatment.

items.es: Todavía me duele la garganta por la mañana.
items.en: My throat still hurts in the morning.

items.es: La tos ha mejorado un poco.
items.en: The cough has improved a little.

items.es: No he tenido fiebre desde el lunes.
items.en: I have not had a fever since Monday.
Should I continue taking the medicine?
